subcodes.first_line: I testify, O my God, that Thou art God, there is none other God but Thee, alone, without partner. From time immemorial Thou hast been One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی انک انت الله لا اله الا انت وحدک لا شریک لک لم یزل کنت واحدا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
